subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Although I have already written thee a letter, yet I am once again engaged in writing, for the [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان هر چند بتو نامه نگاشتم ولی دوباره بتحریر مشغول شدم بجهت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort
